Meaning.Vi: Cá trắm cờ (loài cá nước ngọt, thân dài, hàm có răng sắc)
Meaning.En: A predatory freshwater fish with a long, slender body and sharp teeth, commonly found in lakes and rivers of North America and Europe.
Meaning.Example: The angler caught a large northern pike in the lake early this morning.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả việc câu cá hoặc quan sát cá pike trong tự nhiên.
Situation.En: Describing fishing for or observing pike in natural habitats.

Meaning.Vi: Cây lau (dùng làm vũ khí cổ)
Meaning.En: A long, heavy spear with a pointed metal head, used historically by infantry as a defensive or offensive weapon.
Meaning.Example: The medieval soldiers formed a tight formation with their pikes to repel the cavalry charge.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả chiến thuật quân sự thời Trung cổ sử dụng giáo dài.
Situation.En: Describing medieval infantry tactics using long spears against cavalry.
